use_cases: Landing page hero sections for SaaS products and services
Product announcement and feature reveal pages
Creative portfolio and media showcase sections
ai_summary: A dark-themed hero component featuring illuminated glowing text effects using SVG filters and animated background shadows. The component combines glass-morphism styling with gradient text and opacity animations to create a premium, attention-grabbing hero section for landing pages and product announcements. Multiple animated layers create a sophisticated visual depth effect.
